pattern: Brute-force over all (i,j) pairs: a pair is good when nums1[i] is divisible by nums2[j]*k.
hints: A pair (i,j) qualifies when nums1[i] mod (nums2[j] * k) equals zero.
With small constraints (n,m ≤ 50, values ≤ 50) a simple double loop over all pairs is fast enough.
Multiply each nums2[j] by k first, then check divisibility for every nums1[i].

edge_inputs.description: single element arrays, k=1 exact divisor
single element arrays, k=2, not divisible
k large enough that no product divides anything
all nums1 equal 1, only nums2[j]*k=1 qualifies

stress.description: random small arrays with values in [1,50]
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = min(size, 50)
    m = min(size, 50)
    nums1 = [rng.randint(1, 50) for _ in range(n)]
    nums2 = [rng.randint(1, 50) for _ in range(m)]
    k = rng.randint(1, 50)
    return [nums1, nums2, k]
